phrases.context: Used to ask for the current time.
Used to state the current time.
Used when buying or requesting a specific quantity of items.

phrases.english: My phone number is nine eight seven six five four three two one zero.
phrases.arabic: رقم هاتفي هو تسعة ثمانية سبعة ستة خمسة أربعة ثلاثة اثنان واحد صفر.
phrases.pronunciation: Raqmu haatifi huwa tis'ah thamaaniyah sab'ah sittah khamsah arba'ah thalaathah ithnaan waahid sifr.
phrases.context: Used to share your phone number.

phrases.english: The meeting is at ten thirty in the morning.
phrases.context: Used to specify a time for an event.
